title: Dora AI
abstract: Dora AI handles image generation, video creation and 3D modeling from text descriptions. Built for creators who want results without the software learning curve.
abstract_zh: 你们的效率小助手 **Dora AI** 来啦！写周报时再也不怕词穷了，它能帮你一键生成创意段落；调Bug时也能提供专业建议，让你省时又省力。别再被枯燥的工作困住了，来和 Dora AI 一起嗨起来吧！
